_comment: CUSTOMIZE: Copy this file, then replace every example job name and scrape URL with values from your Prometheus targets page.

expected_targets._comment: CUSTOMIZE: Use the exact job label and scrape URL for one expected target.
CUSTOMIZE: Add, remove, or duplicate entries until this list matches the complete active-target set you expect.
CUSTOMIZE: Query parameters are part of the scrape URL and must match exactly.

_forbidden_substrings_comment: CUSTOMIZE: List retired addresses or names that must never appear in a scrape URL, or use an empty list.
_required_health_comment: CUSTOMIZE: Leave this as up unless your Prometheus API uses a different accepted health value.
